role: Source code directory of a demo project for the ArchSpine mirror system, containing API, domain, and infrastructure layers for user management.
responsibility: Combined, these components implement a user management flow (creation, retrieval) with an intentionally flawed architecture where the API handler bypasses the domain layer to directly access the database, while the domain layer uses in-memory storage, and the infrastructure layer manages database connections for SQLite and PostgreSQL.

children.role: API handler layer for user creation, serving as the entry point for incoming requests.
Represents the user domain service layer for in-memory management of user entities.
The root directory of the ArchSpine mirror system project, containing the primary database connectivity module.
